articles.description:
Tom Lee’s BitMine Immersion Technologies has purchased nearly 100,000 ETH in a single week, doubling down on Ethereum ahead of the Fusaka upgrade.

The post BitMine Buys Nearly 100,000 ETH in a Week as Market Drops, Bets Big on Fusaka Upgrade first appeared on Ecoinimist.
